_note: STARTER PLACEHOLDER LABELS. These are first-pass guesses written by Claude from a visual scan of the sample images, not authoritative human ground truth. Revise the 'expected' deltas (per-category, integer in -10..10 for lighting/composition/background/eyecontact, -5..5 for headpose) based on your own portrait-photo intuition before drawing strong conclusions from the eval.

sample1.jpg.note: NASA studio portrait of Kalpana Chawla in orange flight suit; US flag on left edge intrudes; flat studio lighting; direct smile; muted backdrop.

sample2.jpg.note: Tight headshot of smiling man against grey marble wall; soft window light with clear catchlights; head clipped near top; warm, natural skin.

sample3.jpg.note: Studio beauty portrait of young woman with topknot bun on solid pink seamless; flat even light; direct gaze; frontal symmetric pose.

sample4.jpg.note: Moody low-key male portrait in chunky knit on black background; directional side key creates shape; serious neutral expression; frontal.

sample5.jpg.note: Golden-hour outdoor portrait of woman with rim light from sunset; shallow DOF blurred field; slight head turn, soft closed-lip smile.

sample6.jpg.note: B&W studio headshot of bald bearded man smiling; clean grey gradient sweep; even soft key; frontal pose; warm crinkled eyes.

sample7.jpg.note: Headshot of young man framed hard against right edge of frame; grey studio wall; flat even light; neutral closed-mouth expression.

sample8.jpg.note: Editorial portrait with heavy blue gel lighting; magenta/violet falloff on background; strong color cast on skin; flat neutral expression.

sample9.jpg.note: Corporate environmental portrait of smiling woman in striped jacket; office glass wall background with horizontal lines; soft natural light.

sample10.jpg.note: Outdoor laughing portrait of woman in red top; gorgeous bokeh background; warm light; full open-mouth laugh but eyes nearly closed.

sample11.jpg.note: Businessman in dark suit with red tie, arms crossed; moody urban background with bare trees; flat overcast light; serious closed-mouth.
